summary: Discord-like app with server browsing, invite code joining, and channel management features
architectural_notes: Discord-like communication platform with servers and channels
Server system with both public browsing and invite-based joining
known_issues: actor.createChannel is not a function - blocking channel creation in Version 10

existing_features.title: Add a server browser view that displays all available public servers that users can browse and join. Include server name, member count, and description in the listings.
Enhance the existing join server dialog to support both invite code entry and direct server selection from the browse view. Ensure users can successfully join servers through both methods.
Improve message composer UX by adding visual feedback for mentions, improving attachment preview layouts, and enhancing the send button state to show when content is ready to send.
Add online status indicators for users in the members list and channel timeline to show who is currently active.
Enhance server cards in the server list with visual previews including server icon, member count badges, and online member indicators.

new_feature_requests.summary: Server browsing - users can view and join available servers from a list
Fix the actor.createChannel is not a function error that is preventing channel creation in the current version. Ensure the createChannel method exists in the backend actor and is properly exported.
Add backend support for listing all public servers with their metadata including name, description, member count, and creation date.
